_readme: One entry per real financial statement PDF you want to score.
Fill in only the fields you can verify by reading the PDF yourself --
leave a field out (don't guess a 0) if you don't have a trustworthy value for it.
'pdf' should point at the file under eval/pdfs/. 'tier' is 'fast' or 'accurate'.
All figures are the LATEST year column, matching what reconcile.py checks.
